scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const pool=new Pool({host:process.env.DB_HOST,port:process.env.DB_PORT,database:process.env.DB_NAME,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD}); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('../tools/seed.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('Seed complete');pool.end()}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);pool.end();process.exit(1)})"
